fact_nuggets.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation I to II 1.2 Generation III to VII 1.3 Generation VIII onward Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation I to II [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokemon, adds 2560 Defense Stat Experience to the target Pokemon per use, until it has 25600 Defense Stat Experience. In Generation II , it also increases the Pokemon's friendship a little. The Iron is consumed upon use and cannot be used in battle. Generation III to VII [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokemon, adds 10 Defense EVs to the target Pokemon per use, until it has 100 Defense EVs. It also increases the Pokemon's friendship a little. The Iron is consumed upon use and cannot be used in battle. Generation VIII onward [ edit | edit source ] Iron can now be used even on a Pokemon that has 100 Defense EVs or more, allowing the Defense EVs to be raised to the single-stat cap of 252 or the total cap of 510 this way. Effect [ edit | edit source ] A consumable item that raises the Defense of Pokemon that ingests it by 3 and restores 5 Belly for it. If thrown, it will grant the same effect as if it was consumed by the Pokemon it hits (it cannot be caught); if it is sticky , it will also deal 2 damage. Iron can be blended into a drink at Spinda's Juice Bar , although it has no special effects.
Used for berry recipes or blending
Boosts Pokemon That Ingests It By's stats
